title: The Neighbours
description: The Neighbours is a comedy show about the couple next door. The perfect couple. Except... What were those noises coming through the wall this morning? And who was that knocking at their door in the middle of the night? And what were they really throwing out at the recycling bins? Currer smells a rat, and not just because his flat’s infested. Notting Hill meets Rear Window in a true story packed with jokes and twists. ‘Quite weird, very funny’ – Guardian
